Name: FXAA
Description: Fast Approximate Anti-Aliasing (FXAA) post-processing effect that reduces visible edge aliasing by smoothing high-contrast pixel transitions in screen-space without requiring additional geometry sampling.

Fields.Name: Anti-Alias Mode
Fields.Description: Selects the FXAA quality or behavior mode, typically controlling trade-off between performance and edge smoothing strength.

Fields.Name: Alpha
Fields.Description: Global blending factor for FXAA effect intensity, controlling how strongly anti-aliasing is applied over the final image.

Fields.Name: Reduce Minimum
Fields.Description: Minimum luminance reduction threshold used in edge detection to avoid over-smoothing low-contrast areas and preserve fine detail.

Fields.Name: Reduce Muliplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier controlling sensitivity of edge detection by scaling luminance differences used in FXAA sampling.

Fields.Name: Span Maximum
Fields.Description: Maximum pixel span used during edge search and smoothing; higher values allow FXAA to detect and blur wider aliasing edges.
